The '''Ministry of War''' was the civilian ministry that controlled the armed forces of the [[Five Worlds]]. Its jurisdiction included the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]], [[Corellian Security Force]], and a [[Corellian Home Fleet|secret starfleet]] being produced at the [[Kiris shipyards]]. It was under the control of the [[Minister of War (Five Worlds)|Minister of War]], and headquartered in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]]. Its successor was the [[Ministry of Defense (Five Worlds)|Ministry of Defense]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''
